goal: Win Xiaomi MiMo Orbit Max plan with a stronger agentic workflow product.

agents.output: Packaged a form-ready Max application emphasizing multi-agent workflow, high-volume usage, auditability, and MiMo API extensibility.

audit.hallucinationRisk: low: outputs are deterministic project artifacts and clearly label the MiMo API adapter as integration-ready
audit.privacyRisk: low: no private credentials or user secrets are required for demo mode
audit.evidenceQuality: high: repo includes UI, CLI run, docs, and generated proof report
